about: A simple non-AI speech synthesizer written in Python (2026)
description:
PieSynth is a simple speech synthesizer which uses pre-recorded voice samples (of my voice) to reproduce speech or other vocals. It's called PieSynth because it's written in Python. Pysynth probably already exists. A work in progress. 

Started on 3/20/2026
Released on 3/20/2026
